COMPANIES ACT
(REGISTER OF BENEFICIAL OWNERS)

[ L.S. 386.19

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.19
REGOLAMENTI DWAR COMPANIES ACT
(REGISTER OF BENEFICIAL OWNERS)
1st ta’ Jannar, 2018
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 374 tal-2017, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 184 tal2018, 158 tal-2019, 247 tal-2020 u 127 tal-2025.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
